info.title: OKX API
info.description: OKX (formerly OKEx) cryptocurrency exchange REST API v5. Provides trading, market data, account management, funding, and public data endpoints for spot, margin, futures, perpetual swaps, and options trading.

get.description: Retrieve available trading instruments for the account.
Retrieve account balance information.

parameters.name: ccy
parameters.description: Single or multiple currencies separated by commas.

get.description: Retrieve current positions.
Retrieve historical positions.

parameters.name: after
parameters.description: Pagination: query records before this ID.

parameters.name: before
parameters.description: Pagination: query records after this ID.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Number of results per request. Maximum 100.

get.description: Retrieve account and position risk data.
Retrieve bills details for the last 7 days.
Retrieve current account configuration.

post.description: Set the position mode for the account.
Set the leverage for an instrument.

instId.description: Instrument ID. Required for isolated mode.

get.description: Retrieve the maximum order quantity for an instrument.
Retrieve the maximum available tradeable amount.
Retrieve leverage setting for an instrument.
Retrieve trading fee rates.
Retrieve the maximum withdrawal amount.
Retrieve the account risk state.
Retrieve details of a specific order.

post.description: Place multiple orders in a single request (max 20).
Cancel multiple orders in a single request.

get.description: Retrieve all pending/open orders.
Retrieve order history for the last 7 days.
Retrieve order history for the last 3 months.
Retrieve recent transaction/fill details.
Retrieve historical transaction/fill details.
Retrieve ticker information for all instruments of a type.
Retrieve ticker data for a specific instrument.
Retrieve the order book for an instrument.
Retrieve the full order book snapshot.
Retrieve candlestick/OHLCV data for an instrument.
Retrieve historical candlestick data.
Retrieve recent trades for an instrument.
Retrieve historical trade data.
Retrieve available trading instruments (public, no auth required).
Retrieve the current funding rate for a perpetual swap.
Retrieve historical funding rates.
Retrieve open interest data.
Retrieve the mark price for an instrument.
Retrieve the limit price for an instrument.
Retrieve underlying assets.

type.description: Transfer type: 0=within account, 1=master to sub, 2=sub to master.

get.description: Retrieve deposit addresses for a currency.
Retrieve deposit records.
Retrieve withdrawal records.
Retrieve available currencies for deposit and withdrawal.
Retrieve funding account balance.

ApiSign.name: OK-ACCESS-SIGN
ApiSign.description: Base64-encoded HMAC SHA256 signature of timestamp + method + requestPath + body using secret key

ApiPassphrase.name: OK-ACCESS-PASSPHRASE
ApiPassphrase.description: API passphrase specified when creating the API key

msg.description: Error message. Empty if code is 0.

ccy.description: Margin currency. Required for cross margin orders.

px.description: Order price. Required for limit orders.

reduceOnly.description: Whether this is a reduce-only order.

tgtCcy.description: Target currency for quantity: base_ccy or quote_ccy.

tags.name: Trading Account
tags.description: Account management endpoints for balances, positions, leverage, and configuration

tags.name: Trade
tags.description: Order management endpoints for placing, canceling, and querying orders

tags.name: Market Data
tags.description: Public market data endpoints for tickers, order books, candles, and trades

tags.name: Public Data
tags.description: Public reference data endpoints for instruments, funding rates, and mark prices

tags.name: Funding
tags.description: Funding account endpoints for transfers, deposits, and withdrawals
